chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRAs 1056, 1057 and 1058 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.4805/2024 13.11.2025 Mr. Shahnawaz M. Sahito, advocate for the applicant Mr. Omer Soomro, advocate for respondent On 09.10.2025, following order was passed: “These reference applications assail common judgment. Per learned counsel, while numerous appeals were pending, the same have been decided without any independent deliberation and discussion of peculiar facts and circumstances. He further states that the impugned judgment is entirely premised on reproduction and leads to a dissonant conclusion, hence, merits interference” Today learned counsel for respondent is present and states that in view of the foregoing it may be just and proper for the impugned judgment to be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within one month. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
